title: Proactive Supervisor — ambient senior engineer with boundary-proactive direction steer
approach: Partially supersede ADR-008's 'steers Main ONLY on drift' clause (narrower than ADR-011's supersession) while preserving ADR-008's single supervisor, no mailbox panel, no standalone /gate, ABSOLUTE never-dispatches (not 'never-dispatches-writable'), never-edits, extensions:false read-only posture, per-session scope, and Main-sole-integrator. Extend the supervisor from reactive-only to reactive + boundary-proactive via an EXPLICIT BLOCKING HANDSHAKE in each lifecycle prompt (user-approved, replacing unreliable best-effort agent_settled inference): /create Phase 10B, /plan Phase 8B, /research Phase 5, /ship Phase 6A — all after the phase's writes/review/close settle and before Output. /verify gets NO handshake (supervisor is opener-only; verify remains closer + sole terminal-verified authority per ADR-006). At each boundary the supervisor scouts for direction/strategy (prior art, cross-slug redundancy, superseded decisions, gold-plating, a better path) and steers as the OPENER for the next phase, leaving the ADR-011 review gate as the CLOSER that audits the just-finished artifact (past vs future object split, no overlap). Add a read-only research-request capability that is Main-mediated via a two-round blocking handshake: the supervisor is extensions:false so it cannot spawn (pi-fabric 0.23.0 docs/agents.md:214: extensions:false opts out of agents.*); round 1 Main sends agents.ask({id,message,data:{protocol:'proactive-supervisor/v1',kind:'phase-complete',requestId,...}}), the actor responds with action:'silent' + data (kind:no-advice|direction-steer|research-request); if research-request, Main runs ONE agents.run on gpt-5.4-mini (read-only, extensions:false, recursive:false, read/grep/find/ls, worktree:false), synthesizes a <=8KiB non-secret summary with source paths, and sends round 2 agents.ask({...,kind:'research-result',requestId,...}); the actor responds with action:'silent' + final direction-steer/no-advice. CRITICAL: direct protocol responses MUST use action:'silent' with payload in data — action:'message' is auto-delivered by delivery:'steer' BEFORE agents.ask resolves (manager.js:734-758), bypassing Main validation; action:'message' is reserved for ambient reactive steering only. The agents.ask/agents.run schema is object-form with message required (agents.tell(supervisorId, results) positional form is INVALID). agents.ask resolves reliably even on action:silent (manager.js:362-399,684-758). Main resolves exactly one session-local 'supervisor' actor by exact id from agents.actors(); never address by canonical name over mesh; absent/stopped/ambiguous -> warn and continue (supervisor optional, advisory). Run model is V2: ambient gpt-5.6-sol thinking-max on every agent_settled wake (highest cost, accepted over tiered V4 for steering quality); research on gpt-5.4-mini (fast). Authority is advisory always BUT independently validated Critical/High defects and binding-authority (ADR/AGENTS) violations retain their EXISTING blocking semantics under Main (not because actor self-declares blocking). No mid-writable-run injection: the handshake fires between phases only. Single FIFO semaphore (no auto-yield) but contention is naturally avoided since the handshake is between phases. Research candidates derive from namespace state: absent->['create'], established->['plan','ship'], partial->[]+operator-recovery. Actor configuration is UNCHANGED (same model/tools/events/responseMode/scope); only the instructions and the lifecycle prompt phases change. ADR-012 records the partial supersession; ADR-008 gets a forward reference. Ships after lifecycle-review-gates (ADR-011) settled at HEAD dd0bf96; ADR-012 is next available. The stale pi-fabric 0.22.4 field matrix in supervise.md:29,40-42 is NOTICED BUT NOT TOUCHING (not load-bearing; the actor config is unchanged).
blocks: lifecycle-review-gates (ADR-011) must settle for shared files (supervise.md was protected by that feature; AGENTS/DECISIONS/PLAN/tech-stack/roadmap/state/create/plan/ship) — SETTLED at HEAD dd0bf96; ADR-011 present at DECISIONS.md:304
ADR-012 is next available (ADR-010 = prewalk handoff, ADR-011 = lifecycle review gates)
The supervisor actor configuration is UNCHANGED (extensions:false read-only posture preserved; ADR-008's ABSOLUTE never-dispatches preserved via Main-mediated research)
No new agent lane or model tier; no capability widening (supervisor stays extensions:false, read/grep/find/ls, no bash, non-recursive; research on existing gpt-5.4-mini explore/scout lane)
No change to .pi/fabric.json, .pi/settings.json, .opencode/command/*.md source bodies, /verify.md (no handshake), or historical milestone artifacts
No mid-writable-run injection; handshake fires between phases only

success_criteria.criterion: A1: spec/prd rebased to the corrected 7-task handshake design; .active=proactive-supervisor; prd is a 7-task bounded graph (A/B/C = 2/2/3); no stale 'consistent with ADR-008' or invalid 'agents.tell(supervisorId' or best-effort inference framing in spec
success_criteria.verify: test "$(cat .opencode/artifacts/.active)" = 'proactive-supervisor' && node -e 'const p=require("./.opencode/artifacts/proactive-supervisor/prd.json");const ids=new Map(p.tasks.map((t,i)=>[t.id,i]));const counts={};if(p.tasks.length!==7||ids.size!==7)process.exit(1);for(const [i,t] of p.tasks.entries()){if(t.files.length>3)process.exit(1);counts[t.child_plan]=(counts[t.child_plan]||0)+1;for(const d of t.depends_on){if(!ids.has(d)||ids.get(d)>=i)process.exit(1)}}if(counts.A!==2||counts.B!==2||counts.C!==3)process.exit(1)' && ! rg -n 'consistent with ADR-008|agents\.tell\(supervisorId|ambient event snapshot indicates' .opencode/artifacts/proactive-supervisor/spec.md && rg -n 'Explicit Boundary Handshake|proactive-supervisor/v1|action:"silent"' .opencode/artifacts/proactive-supervisor/spec.md && git diff --check

success_criteria.criterion: A2: supervise.md has ### Boundary-Proactive Direction Steer and ### Main-Mediated Research Protocol sections; ADR-008 'steers ONLY on drift' clause replaced; Main-mediated + ABSOLUTE never-dispatches present; EACH hard limit (never dispatch / never edit / never certify / never self-stop) present independently; actor config unchanged (model/tools/events/responseMode/extensions); frontmatter + forbidden-token clean
success_criteria.verify:
rg -n '^### Boundary-Proactive Direction Steer$' .pi/prompts/supervise.md && rg -n '^### Main-Mediated Research Protocol$' .pi/prompts/supervise.md && rg -n 'Main-mediated|proactive-supervisor/v1|action:"silent"' .pi/prompts/supervise.md && ! rg -n 'steers Main ONLY on material drift' .pi/prompts/supervise.md && rg -ni 'never dispatch' .pi/prompts/supervise.md && rg -ni 'never.*edit|never edit' .pi/prompts/supervise.md && rg -ni 'never certify' .pi/prompts/supervise.md && rg -ni 'never.*self-stop|never \{action:"stop"\}' .pi/prompts/supervise.md && node -e 'const s=require("fs").readFileSync(".pi/prompts/supervise.md","utf8");for(const x of ["openai-codex/gpt-5.6-sol","extensions: false","responseMode: "directive"","delivery","triggerTurn","tools: ["read","grep","find","ls"]"]){if(!s.includes(x))process.exit(1)}' && node -e 'const s=require("fs").readFileSync(".pi/prompts/supervise.md","utf8");const m=/^---
([\s\S]*?)
---
/.exec(s);if(!m||!/description:/.test(m[1]))process.exit(1)' && ! rg -n 'agent:|task\(|question\(|skill\(|write\(|\.active|spec\.md|prd\.json|review-state\.json' .pi/prompts/supervise.md && git diff --check

success_criteria.criterion: B1: /create has Phase 10B Supervisor Boundary Handshake after Phase 10A before Phase 11; /plan has Phase 8B after Phase 8A before Phase 9; both use the versioned protocol, agents.ask object form, gpt-5.4-mini research, action:silent direct responses; ADR-011 markers (Phase 10A, Phase 8A) preserved
success_criteria.verify: rg -n '^## Phase 10A: Spec Review Gate$' .pi/prompts/create.md && rg -n '^## Phase 10B: Supervisor Boundary Handshake$' .pi/prompts/create.md && rg -n '^## Phase 11: Report$' .pi/prompts/create.md && rg -n '^## Phase 8A: Planning Review Gate$' .pi/prompts/plan.md && rg -n '^## Phase 8B: Supervisor Boundary Handshake$' .pi/prompts/plan.md && rg -n '^## Phase 9: Report$' .pi/prompts/plan.md && rg -n 'proactive-supervisor/v1|agents\.ask|gpt-5\.4-mini|action:"silent"' .pi/prompts/create.md .pi/prompts/plan.md && node -e 'const fs=require("fs");for(const [f,h] of [[".pi/prompts/create.md",["## Phase 10A: Spec Review Gate","## Phase 10B: Supervisor Boundary Handshake","## Phase 11: Report"]],[".pi/prompts/plan.md",["## Phase 8A: Planning Review Gate","## Phase 8B: Supervisor Boundary Handshake","## Phase 9: Report"]]]){const s=fs.readFileSync(f,"utf8");let p=-1;for(const x of h){const n=s.indexOf(x);if(n<=p)process.exit(1);p=n}}' && git diff --check

success_criteria.criterion: B2: /research has Phase 5 Supervisor Boundary Handshake after Phase 4 Document before Output with namespace-state candidates (absent->create, established->plan/ship, partial->recovery); /ship has Phase 6A after Phase 6 Close before Output advertising verify only; ship 'cannot declare verified' phrase preserved; ADR-011 markers preserved
success_criteria.verify: rg -n '^### Phase 4: Document$' .pi/prompts/research.md && rg -n '^### Phase 5: Supervisor Boundary Handshake$' .pi/prompts/research.md && rg -n '^## Output$' .pi/prompts/research.md && rg -n 'namespaceState|absent|established|partial' .pi/prompts/research.md && rg -n '^## Phase 6: Close$' .pi/prompts/ship.md && rg -n '^## Phase 6A: Supervisor Boundary Handshake$' .pi/prompts/ship.md && rg -n 'proactive-supervisor/v1|agents\.ask|gpt-5\.4-mini' .pi/prompts/research.md .pi/prompts/ship.md && rg -q 'cannot declare (terminal )?(verified status|completion)' .pi/prompts/ship.md && rg -n '^### Tier-Gated Diff Review$' .pi/prompts/ship.md && node -e 'const fs=require("fs");for(const [f,h] of [[".pi/prompts/research.md",["### Phase 4: Document","### Phase 5: Supervisor Boundary Handshake","## Output"]],[".pi/prompts/ship.md",["## Phase 6: Close","## Phase 6A: Supervisor Boundary Handshake","## Output"]]]){const s=fs.readFileSync(f,"utf8");let p=-1;for(const x of h){const n=s.indexOf(x);if(n<=p)process.exit(1);p=n}}' && git diff --check
